summary: The conversation is about a PhD admission inquiry at BMI University. Speaker 0 is inquiring about the admission process, fees, and requirements for the PhD program. Speaker 1 provides information and clarifies the process, including the online application, entrance exam, and fees. The discussion also covers the duration of the program, attendance requirements, and the possibility of submitting a research paper.

key_discussion_points.details: The admission process starts with online registration, followed by an entrance exam. The exam will be held in November, and the last date for registration is the 19th.
The fee for the PhD program is one and a half lakh per year, and it's a three-year program. However, the program can be completed in three years or five years, and the fees will be paid accordingly.
The entrance exam will be based on the graduation syllabus, and it will be held in November. The exam will be online, and the details will be confirmed later.
For students with GRF, 75% attendance is compulsory. However, for students with private jobs, attendance is not a problem.
There is no need to submit a research paper for admission. However, after admission, students will be given a topic to research and submit a paper.

decisions_made: The admission process will start with online registration
The entrance exam will be held in November
The fee for the PhD program is one and a half lakh per year
follow_up: Speaker 0 needs to visit the university for further clarification and confirmation of the admission process
